mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO overseas_stock_order_detail ( overseas_order_no, s_wid, r_wid, status, product_code, sku, seller_id, package_num, tariffs_currency_unit, box_type, box_sku, box_third_party_product_name, box_third_party_product_code, box_seller_id, box_range, box_number, cg_box_weight, cg_box_length, cg_box_width, cg_box_height, quantity_in_case, box_cbm, total_box_volume, total_box_weight, total_box_volume_weight, box_remark, order_total_box_num, order_total_box_weight, order_total_box_volume, order_total_box_volume_weight ) VALUES
( #{e.overseasOrderNo}, #{e.sWid}, #{e.rWid}, #{e.status}, #{e.productCode}, #{e.sku}, #{e.sellerId}, #{e.packageNum}, #{e.tariffsCurrencyUnit}, #{e.boxType}, #{e.boxSku}, #{e.boxThirdPartyProductName}, #{e.boxThirdPartyProductCode}, #{e.boxSellerId}, #{e.boxRange}, #{e.boxNumber}, #{e.cgBoxWeight}, #{e.cgBoxLength}, #{e.cgBoxWidth}, #{e.cgBoxHeight}, #{e.quantityInCase}, #{e.boxCbm}, #{e.totalBoxVolume}, #{e.totalBoxWeight}, #{e.totalBoxVolumeWeight}, #{e.boxRemark}, #{e.orderTotalBoxNum}, #{e.orderTotalBoxWeight}, #{e.orderTotalBoxVolume}, #{e.orderTotalBoxVolumeWeight} )
